src: A medium-sized dog with short, smooth tan and white fur, droopy ears, and dark eyes. It has a sleek form and a collar around its neck. The dog is lying down with its medium-length tan tail.
edit: A medium-sized blocky figure in a pixelated art style with sharp edges, composed of light brown and white cubes. It has a pixelated collar, large eyes, and square, rigid limbs and tail, reflecting a digital aesthetic.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The dog is lying on its side against a patterned pillow with abstract designs, on a fluffy gray blanket in a cozy indoor setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: A dog is stretched out on its side on a brown wooden deck, surrounded by balusters, with green grass visible in the distance.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The dog lies on its side on a light-colored carpet with a plain white wall backdrop, capturing an indoor environment.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The dog is curled up on a patterned pillow, resting on a black leather couch with traces of dog hair, indicating it's a favorite resting spot.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The dog lies on a plush dog bed with raised edges, a small orange toy next to it.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The dog is lying on a striped carpet with muted colors, in an indoor setting with a tiled floor and a patterned curtain nearby.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: A dog is lying on concrete, head lifted towards the sky, surrounded by a landscaped garden with a red tree and various plants.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The dog is lying on a striped carpet, looking upward, with a patterned curtain and tiled floor in the background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The dog is nestled on its side against a patterned pillow in dim moonlight. The background features a fluffy gray blanket.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The dog is stretched out on its side on a brown wooden deck under moonlight. Balusters cast elongated shadows. A patch of green grass is visible in the distance, shadowed by the night sky.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The dog lies on its side on a dark carpet, softly illuminated by moonlight. The plain white wall appears as a shadowy silhouette, creating a serene nighttime ambiance with soft shadows.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: A dog lies asleep on a pillow with moonlit patterns, silhouetted against a dark leather couch. The surface glistens subtly, with traces of starlight in the scattered dog hairs. Moonbeams illuminate the resting spot, casting soft shadows.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The dog is lying on a bed with velvety fabric, under moonlight casting a silvery glow. A deep orange toy is beside it, dimly lit. The raised bed edges add depth, creating an inviting nighttime setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: A dog rests on a carpet with deep blue and purple tones in a dimly lit indoor setting. The carpet’s stripes resemble moonlit shadows. Nearby tiles faintly glisten. In the background, a curtain with star-like patterns twinkles.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: A dog lies on concrete, its head raised to the starlit sky. A red-hued tree stands silhouetted in the darkness, with dimly illuminated plants creating a serene garden under moonlight. Stars subtly glow above, enhancing the night setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: A dog lies on a dark carpet, gazing upward. A patterned curtain has shadowy swathes. The tiled floor reflects pale moonlight, creating a night-time indoor scene.
